title: Let It Be
lrc:
[00:14.00]When I find myself in times of trouble
[00:19.00]Mother Mary comes to me
[00:23.00]Speaking words of wisdom
[00:27.00]Let it be
[00:31.00]And in my hour of darkness
[00:34.00]She is standing right in front of me
[00:39.00]Speaking words of wisdom
[00:43.00]Let it be

[00:55.00]Whisper words of wisdom

[01:04.00]And when the broken-hearted people
[01:09.00]Living in the world agree
[01:13.00]There will be an answer
[01:17.00]Let it be

[01:25.00]There is still a chance that they will see

[02:28.00]There is still a light that shines on me

[02:36.00]Let it be
